text:
Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom – Mineru Construct amiibo release date finally revealed [update: pre-orders]

May 11: We’ve been waiting a long time for this one, but Nintendo just provided the release date for the Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom Mineru Construct amiibo. It’s slated for September 17, 2026. The Mineru Construct amiibo has articulated arms that can be moved around. Nintendo says that it has “a fair bit of freedom to its movement”, allowing...

The post Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom – Mineru Construct amiibo release date finally revealed [update: pre-orders] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo Switch Online adds new Virtual Boy games in May 2026 update

A new set of Virtual Boy games are live on Nintendo Switch Online as part of May 2026 update. The lineup includes V-Tetris, Jack Bros., Space Invaders Virtual Collection, Virtual Bowling, and Vertical Force. All of these titles can be accessed after downloading the latest update for the Virtual Boy – Nintendo Classics app. Note that you need to be...

The post Nintendo Switch Online adds new Virtual Boy games in May 2026 update appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
The Legend of Zelda movie release date moved forward

The Legend of Zelda movie is changing its release date once again, but this time it’s moving forward. The film will now hit theaters on April 30, 2027. This marks the second release date change. Originally, the The Legend of Zelda movie was planned for March 26, 2027. Nintendo later announced that the release date had been delayed to May...

The post The Legend of Zelda movie release date moved forward appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
The Last Faith gains free Awakened Ancients DLC on Nintendo Switch

Starting today, Nintendo Switch owners can get their hands on brand new DLC known as The Last Faith. It is completely free to download. The DLC includes New Game+, Dungeon Mode, Boss Rush Mode, and Tower of Despair. The team packed in all-new executions, gameplay improvements, new selectable characters, items and weapons. Here’s a full rundown of everything included: Descend...

The post The Last Faith gains free Awakened Ancients DLC on Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Roguelike shoot ’em up Ira announced for Nintendo Switch 2

Publisher Nicalis has announced their title Ira for Nintendo Switch 2. The title is planned for a digital launch sometime this summer. Ira is an action roguelike shoot ’em up with procedurally generated levels. You’ll be playing as a young girl searching through a city for fragments of an artifact that will restore peace. You can read a full description...
